reviews.review_description: Loving this, yes you may lose a lot but playing for free is good and get awarded free coins and daily bonus stack up nicely

reviews.review_title: Not worth it, even if it was free.
reviews.review_description:
The only reason i still play this game is because i spent real money on chips.
It's super buggy, and kicks you right out when you win your first hand.
They keep updating it but it keeps getting worse.
we don't need new sound effects, just let us play.
i hope the developers see this and realize they are just making the game worse.
fk this game.
Don't waste your time or money.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback. We’re really sorry the game has been frustrating, especially after you spent real money on chips. Bugs that interrupt play or kick players out are not acceptable, and we understand why that would feel worse when you’re just trying to enjoy the game.

We are actively working on stability and gameplay fixes, not just polish or sound improvements. If you’re willing to share more details, please reach out on Discord so we can look into what happened with your account and the issue after winning a hand: https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr

We appreciate you calling this out, even though the experience has been rough.

reviews.review_description: Good game

I hate games that immediately throw you in with other people. At least give me the chance to learn the game on my own and decide if i want to join a multiplayer room. 

Once i realized what was happening, I just exited the app. Immediate uninstall.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback. That’s completely fair. Not everyone wants to be placed into a multiplayer table right away, especially before getting comfortable with the controls and flow of the game.

We’re sorry the first impression pushed you away. We’ll take this feedback seriously and look at ways to make the onboarding feel less forced, including giving players a clearer choice between learning privately and joining a live table.

We appreciate you trying the game and sharing what made you uninstall.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much. We’re glad you’re enjoying Blackjack.

And no worries, Baccarat takes a minute to learn, but once it clicks, it’s a lot of fun too. See you at the tables.

developer_response.body:
Sorry about that. Blackjack is definitely available in the game, but it sounds like the table selection or navigation was not clear enough.

You can find Blackjack tables from the table list, or use Quick Join to get seated faster. We’ll keep working on making this easier to understand so players do not feel stuck in the slots area.

If you still cannot find it, join our Discord and we’ll help you directly: https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr

reviews.review_description: In stead of giving me my 10k daily chips i only recieved my day 3 reward. Also the dealer barley bust and really rigged but game is not too bad

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the feedback. We’re sorry the daily reward felt confusing or incorrect.

The Day 3 reward is part of the daily reward streak, but if you believe chips were missing, please reach out to us on Discord so we can look into it: [https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr](https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr)

For the dealer, the game uses random card outcomes, but we understand unlucky streaks can feel really frustrating. We appreciate you playing and sharing what felt off.

reviews.review_description:
I had 5 2 card 20s and 11 2 card 21s
Dealer had 58 2 card 20s and 37 2 card 21s Not including the 17 times i busted hitting on a 12 and the dealers 3-5 csrd 19s and 20s Wrote everything down and had chat gpt give me the odds of loosing with the 1 card deck 0.0002569% I lost everything and yet I did 50k per hand started with 2.7 million I really think it was because I complained to the owner that the skins I bought with real money didnt work in game and never had for years games been rigged fs always had a 1/3 1/4 of the dealers 21s and dealers 2 card 20s

developer_response.body:
Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review. We really appreciate the effort you put into analyzing your results. We want to reassure you that Blackjack uses a certified random number generator (RNG) that follows the same statistical odds you’d find in real casino blackjack. While streaks of bad luck can definitely feel unfair, the results are entirely random and not influenced by player behavior or feedback in any way.

Regarding your note about purchased skins not appearing in-game. We’re sorry you’ve had that experience. That’s absolutely not how it should work. Please reach out to us on Discord: https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr
, and we’ll make sure to help you get that resolved right away.

We truly value your feedback and are continuously working to improve the experience for everyone.

reviews.review_title: Game is rigged and I need an explanation
reviews.review_description: How is it that I can lose 8 hands in a row and not have a single bust. Like really the dealer seems to have magic 20 and magic 21 every single game. I’ve spent countless amounts of money on this game hoping it’ll get better nope it got worse. Lost 1mil is 15 mins. Lost every single hand without busting out the dealer just has 21

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We completely understand how frustrating those streaks can feel. We want to assure you that Blackjack uses a certified random number generator (RNG) that follows real casino odds, meaning every hand is completely random and not influenced by purchases, play history, or player behavior.

It’s absolutely possible to hit losing streaks like the one you described, even without busting. That’s part of how true randomness and blackjack variance can sometimes feel incredibly unfair in short runs.

We take all feedback seriously. If you’d like us to review your account or check anything specific, please reach out on Discord: https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr
. Our team will be happy to help and make sure everything is working as intended.

Thank you again for playing and taking the time to share your thoughts. We truly appreciate it.

Thank you so much for the great review! 🎉 We're glad Blackjack gives you that authentic casino feel—love to hear it! And yes, Baccarat is already live as of update v1.51! 🃏 You can find the tables right next to the blackjack ones. We’d love to hear what you think once you give it a try!

Feel free to join our Discord too: https://dsc.gg/blackjackvr for tips, updates, and community fun. See you at the tables!
